cves.description: A vulnerability has been found in AOMEI Partition Assistant up to 10.10.1. This vulnerability affects unknown code in the library ampa10.sys of the component Kernel Driver. Such manipulation leads to improper access controls. The attack must be carried out locally. The exploit has been disclosed to

In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

ksmbd: scope conn->binding slowpath to bound sessions only

set after the call so that the global session lookup in
